title: Net income
doc_html:
SUBPART C.  COMPUTATION OF NET INCOME

§41.  Net income

"Net income" means the gross income computed under R.S. 47:42 through 47:53, less the deductions allowed by R.S. 47:54 through 47:77.
doc_text:
SUBPART C.  COMPUTATION OF NET INCOME
§41.  Net income
"Net income" means the gross income computed under R.S. 47:42 through 47:53, less the deductions allowed by R.S. 47:54 through 47:77.
